final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster / PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing "GPT5.5" launch, with speaker Sam Altman.

Style/medium: clean corporate presentation cover, flat vector + photorealistic portrait hybrid, polished Chinese VC/PE roadshow aesthetic — think Sequoia China or Hillhouse deck covers
Composition: centered full-bleed layout, speaker portrait anchored bottom-right or bottom-center, headline text dominant upper half, 16:9 slide ratio with generous margin padding
Subject: Sam Altman in business-casual attire, confident forward-facing pose; bold Chinese-market tech launch visual identity with AI neural-network motif in background
Scene/backdrop: deep navy or midnight-blue gradient background with subtle glowing circuit / neural-network mesh pattern, conveying cutting-edge AI technology
Lighting/mood: cool blue-white rim light on portrait, soft ambient glow from background mesh, authoritative and forward-looking mood suited to institutional LP audience
Color palette: deep navy as dominant base, electric blue and white as accent hierarchy, gold or warm amber as single prestige accent for key title text
Materials/textures: smooth gradient background with semi-transparent geometric mesh overlay, matte slide surface feel, no heavy drop shadows
Text (verbatim): "GPT5.5" / "奥特曼" / "全球领先大模型融资路演"
Constraints: must read clearly as a projected 16:9 slide; all Chinese text must be legible at presentation scale; layout must follow Chinese roadshow convention — company/fund logo placeholder top-left, date/venue placeholder bottom-left, speaker name and title bottom-right
Avoid: Western startup pitch clichés (rocket ships, generic lightbulbs); overly dark illegible backgrounds; gradient rainbow color abuse; Behance generic tech poster style; watermarks; distorted portrait face
